name: whatsapp-digest
description: A local, read-only assistant that turns your WhatsApp into a prioritized digest and a searchable history for your AI app.
long_description: Connects to your WhatsApp (via WhatsApp Web, running locally on your machine) and exposes your messages to your AI assistant as read-only tools. Ask for a digest and it returns a short, prioritized brief: what needs a reply, what is time-sensitive, and what is just noise. Or search your history in plain language and get back only the messages that match a topic or person. Nothing is sent, and nothing leaves your machine except the text your AI app reads.

tools.name: whatsapp_status
tools.description: Check whether WhatsApp is linked and ready.

tools.name: link_whatsapp
tools.description: Open a local QR page to link WhatsApp from your phone.

tools.name: list_chats
tools.description: List recent WhatsApp chats with unread counts.

tools.name: get_messages
tools.description: Get WhatsApp messages from the last N hours.
